description_long: This shotgun features a classic design with a long, blued steel barrel and a wooden stock and fore-end, both finished in a medium brown with visible wood grain. The receiver and barrel are matte black, with the receiver housing a trigger and a rounded trigger guard. The fore-end is ribbed for grip, indicating a pump-action mechanism, and the barrel is topped with a simple bead sight. The stock is a full, traditional style with a slightly curved butt and a black recoil pad. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, suitable for both utility and defense in urban environments.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long black barrel, ribbed wooden fore-end, and a full wooden stock with a black recoil pad.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and long black barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view down the barrel, emphasizing the narrow profile and the ribbed fore-end grip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first but showing the other side of the wooden stock and fore-end.
description_view_3: Rear view from the buttstock, showing the black recoil pad and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
